description:
You are the Controller at Pacific Northwest Timber Products. Open the draft quarterly review at /home/ga/Documents/Q3_review_draft.odt and the financial data at /home/ga/Documents/financial_data.json. Complete the Q3 FY2024 Quarterly Financial Review.

The Consolidated P&L table in Section 2 contains incorrect manually-typed totals. Delete them and replace with Writer table formulas: a Total Revenue formula summing the four revenue line items, a Total Expenses formula summing the six expense line items, and a Net Operating Income formula computing Revenue minus Expenses.

Section 4 ("Capital Expenditures") contains only placeholder text. Replace it with a landscape-oriented page showing a 5-year CapEx projection table from the JSON data, with the four projects and their FY2024 through FY2028 values. Add a formula row computing each fiscal year's column total. After the table, include the executive note about the Sawmill Line #3 project status from the JSON.

Three section headings (Sections 2, 4, and 5) use bold body text instead of Heading 1 paragraph style — apply the correct style. Insert an auto-generated Table of Contents after the title page. Add a running footer with "PNTP — CONFIDENTIAL" left-aligned and "Page X of Y" right-aligned.

Save as /home/ga/Documents/PNTP_Q3_Review_FY2024.odt.
